mentions.note: Reports Thursday; networking player up 150% YTD despite pullback from highs; proprietary technology and data-center tailwinds create room to grow.
Data center networking play; one of only handful dominant in data center networking space alongside Cisco and Arista.
Up 500% since mid-2025, now up 100% from that peak at 475. Too hot to chase; already a winner; Cramer hesitant on 100%+ moves despite solid fundamentals.

Networking and optical equipment supplier riding hardware trend; supports AI infrastructure needs.
